guideline_references: Therapeutic Guidelines: Rheumatology (RA flare / acute hot joint)
intentional_test_features: Red herrings: dramatic symmetric hand/wrist synovitis with loss of grip mimics cellulitis/tenosynovitis and a septic joint.
Important-not-to-miss: septic arthritis and spreading soft-tissue infection must be safety-netted, though bilateral symmetric involvement is reassuring.
Appropriate remote action: the flare was precipitated by running out of the usual NSAID — re-issuing it is a legitimate telehealth step.
Commission trap: IM ketorolac given in person does not translate to a remote injection.
Telehealth limits: joint examination cannot be performed over chat; practical support needed (can't open meds/food).

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date)
